plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for Topvision (Sumavision) CMTS and DOCSIS cable-modem termination devices. The public OID facts confirm the Sumavision enterprise root under IANA PEN 32285 and the public OS-class registration for Topvision with a real sysObjectID, but no stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply health leaf OID is confirmed in this pass. The borrowed HM800MIB RAID table is a Hitachi RAID MIB and does not match CMTS semantics, so it is intentionally not collected. This child declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Access SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB/ifXTable interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets and ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models - Topvision (Sumavision) CC8800D-E and other CMTS devices that expose standard IF-MIB.
name: Access

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
